column1: C[cglotfelty: No lie, I have no idea what happened but I took a really wrong turn somewhere
C[james.heiney: I've been pushing you around like a meanie
C[james.heiney: it won't score correctly without a few more stones
cglotfelty: oh... alright then, lets continue the slaughter
cglotfelty: i'm just filling in... i figure that's what we need
C[james.heiney: that's okay. you're gonna need them
C[cglotfelty: now, the question is are you willing to comment during or just after?
james.heiney: I'll comment during. They even have analysis tools
cglotfelty: my last move shoul've been to s14 shouldn't it?
C[james.heiney: no, I would have played over top and put r15 in atari
james.heiney: an extend at r14 would have been best
james.heiney: that would have been a little more standard in that area
C[james.heiney: extending for more liberites for that group
C[james.heiney: did you see the analysis I did?
C[cglotfelty: yeah... i remember wanting to make the knights L, but i couldn't remember why
C[james.heiney: you should have cut those groups
C[cglotfelty: I remember having trouble with this technique previously
C[cglotfelty: Note: I hate it when you do that
C[james.heiney: you did better with that corner.
C[cglotfelty: should I have picked up D13 myself
C[cglotfelty: hehe... been making moves in analysis mode, couldn't figure out why you hadn't gone yet
C[james.heiney: how did that game go for you?
C[james.heiney: that was safe, I couldn't have done anything there
C[cglotfelty: i thought that, but didn't feel kosher about it
cglotfelty: and yes, I know some of this is pointless, i'm just probing a bit
C[james.heiney: that's okay, I'll comment it
C[cglotfelty: are we to the point where we're pretty much done and just talking semantics over a matter of pts?
C[james.heiney: there's one more I can get here...
C[james.heiney: we're all pretty solid here
C[james.heiney: Nice enclosure of white here.
C[cglotfelty: I would've just considered them dead if you hadn't connected.
cglotfelty: Oh, if you haven't read it yet, let Jim explain the ""Evil triangle""
C[cglotfelty: for the record.  I don't like 9 stone.  I feel ""too"" protected.
C[james.heiney: Hopefully you win. I think you're strong enough to win a nine. Don't let me down, Padawan.
C[cglotfelty: noted that i'm not sure where to move there
cglotfelty: i think all of my options wind up being about the same end result
C[james.heiney: I was working two different attacks in that area depending on where you moved.
cglotfelty: oh damn.... that was wrong
C[james.heiney: I wans't paying attention there
C[james.heiney: That corner will be tricky for me now
C[cglotfelty: i'm done for the day, i'm hitting a wall for what i logistically want to do
C[james.heiney: I'll show you how you could have won that exchange later.
cglotfelty: granted, i'm already committed.  Is there anyway for this to do what I want
C[james.heiney: Lucky that undo request is bright red. I almost missed it.
C[cglotfelty: that's not what i wanted to do either
C[cglotfelty: almost placed at T11 instead of S11..... that would've been an oops
james.heiney: yup. I wouldn't have minded though
C[cglotfelty: i kept thinking about video games and i couldn't figure out why
cglotfelty: double atari was on the back of my mind i guess
C[james.heiney: I guess it's time for the review...well, tomorrow it is.
C[cglotfelty: i know what i need to do, but i'm not sure how to do it
C[james.heiney: I'll show you a cool move to reduce that group to no eyes in the comments after. Granted, it won't kill the group, but I would have had to make all new eyes
C[cglotfelty: Do those 2 in the middle count as good eyes?
